final_prompt.prompt:
Create a WeChat official account article cover image for a fragrance new product launch campaign.

Style/medium: needs a "高级质感风" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 2010s Kinfolk magazine editorial minimalism, Aesop brand visual identity (muted luxury packaging), 新中式 refined ink-wash commercial art direction; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be centered composition with the title as the dominant focal element
Subject: must include the fragrance product "染秋" as the subject, with the title text as the hero
Scene/backdrop: needs an autumn-toned atmospheric backdrop — exact scene treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a refined, warm, and quietly luxurious mood — exact lighting is yours
Color palette: needs an autumn-inspired palette (warm amber, muted gold, deep earthy tones) — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: needs a premium tactile quality — exact material treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋" (large, primary title), "秋意染染 时光留香" (secondary subtitle)
Constraints: must be horizontal format sized for 900×500 WeChat article cover; title must be prominently legible
Avoid: cluttered layout, overly bright or saturated colors, generic stock-photo feel
